message: 🧀 Fun fact: Nothing beats a good Roquefort while coding - it's my secret fuel! ☕️
all_messages: 🧀 Fun fact: Nothing beats a good Roquefort while coding - it's my secret fuel! ☕️
🔧 Refactoring is like cleaning your room - it feels great afterward!
☕ Java got its name from the coffee that developers drank while coding!
